summary: Tested Golden Standard Communication System Phase 2 features. All 14 backend tests passed for Search APIs. Frontend Admin Dashboard verified: Search bar functional, Concierge® labels, (Pet name) labels, Relative timestamps (24m ago, Yesterday), and Channel selector (Chat/WhatsApp/Email) all working correctly.

issues: Many threads show 'Unknown' as user name instead of actual user name - user lookup not working for some threads

action_items: Minor: Fix user name lookup for threads showing 'Unknown' - these appear to be legacy threads without user_name populated
critical_code_review_comments: Search API endpoints well-implemented with proper validation
formatTime function correctly implements relative timestamps (Just now, Xm ago, Yesterday)
AdminMessageBubble correctly shows Concierge® for admin and (PetName) for user messages
Channel selector (Chat/WhatsApp/Email) buttons properly integrated at conversation input area

features_tested.Feature 13 - Message Search (User): PASS - GET /api/concierge/realtime/search returns matching messages with timestamps
features_tested.Feature 14 - Relative Timestamps: PASS - formatTime shows 'Just now', '24m ago', 'Yesterday' format
features_tested.UI Label - Concierge®: PASS - Admin messages show 'Concierge®' label in purple
features_tested.UI Label - (Pet name): PASS - User messages show '(Lola)', '(Mojo)' etc in amber color
features_tested.Channel Selector - Chat: PASS - Chat button visible and styled as primary
features_tested.Channel Selector - WhatsApp: PASS - WhatsApp button visible with green color
features_tested.Channel Selector - Email: PASS - Email button visible with blue color
features_tested.Admin Search Bar: PASS - Search input with data-testid='message-search-input' functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Golden Standard Communication System fully functional. Search APIs at /api/concierge/realtime/search and /api/concierge/realtime/admin/search working. Admin dashboard at /admin/concierge-realtime shows proper labels (Concierge® for admin, (Pet name) for user), relative timestamps, and channel selector (Chat/WhatsApp/Email). Some threads show 'Unknown' user name - cosmetic data issue.
